capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal security training program or service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise security training program exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise security training program or service exists

questions.prompt: Is the security training program reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the security training program is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular security training program efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise document KPIs and KRIs for security training—including completion rates, overdue training, and phishing simulation metrics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security training KPIs and KRIs are documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for security training

questions.prompt: Are security training KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training KPIs are reviewed quarterly.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise proactively develop or source security training content aligned to current risk priorities?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security training content is proactively developed or sourced.
questions.evaluation_focus: Proactive development or sourcing of security education content

questions.prompt: Is the security training curriculum reviewed and refreshed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the training curriculum is reviewed quarterly.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise tailor security trainings for specific functional units and risk profiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training is segmented by role and risk profile.
questions.evaluation_focus: Tailored security trainings for specific functional units

questions.prompt: Are different user segments—such as executives, finance, and engineering—assigned distinct security training paths?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether distinct training paths exist for user segments.
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmented security training for various user groups and risk profiles

questions.prompt: Do new hires and contractors complete mandatory security awareness training before accessing enterprise resources?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether onboarding security training is mandatory before access.
questions.evaluation_focus: Mandatory security awareness for new hires and contractors

questions.prompt: Is onboarding training compliance reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether onboarding training compliance is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular compliance review of onboarding training

capability_questions.capability_name: Phishing simulation and social engineering drills

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise run phishing simulation campaigns on a defined cadence?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether phishing simulations run on a regular cadence.

questions.prompt: Are repeat phishing simulation failures remediated with additional training or coaching?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repeat simulation failures trigger remediation.

questions.prompt: Do developers receive secure-coding and SDLC security training appropriate to their role?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developers receive secure-coding training.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure coding and SDLC training for developers

questions.prompt: Do IT administrators and operations staff receive specialized operational security training reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether technical staff receive operational security training.
questions.evaluation_focus: Administrative and operational security training for IT roles

questions.prompt: Does security training cover AI-augmented attacks, deepfakes, and modern social engineering tactics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training addresses AI-era attack techniques.
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-augmented attack and social engineering awareness

questions.prompt: Does training address shadow AI risks and approved versus unapproved AI tool usage?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether shadow AI and approved-tool training is provided.
questions.evaluation_focus: Shadow AI and approved-tool usage training

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a training delivery platform to assign, track, and report on security training enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise training delivery platform is used.

questions.prompt: Are training assignments, reminders, and completion tracking automated, with platform configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training delivery is automated with quarterly platform review.
